title: Ozempic Doesn't Just Quiet Hunger. It May Quiet Every Craving You Have.
description: A 600,000-person VA study found GLP-1 drugs cut substance-related deaths by 50%. A Swedish nationwide cohort found they outperformed naltrexone — the best FDA-approved alcohol medication — by more than double. Now a randomized trial confirms the signal. The question is no longer whether semaglutide reduces addiction. It's whether addiction was a metabolic disorder all along.
heroImageAlt: Editorial illustration for Ozempic Doesn't Just Quiet Hunger. It May Quiet Every Craving You Have.
